memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Walter de Haliburton (died 1449)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Walter de Haliburton, 1st Lord Haliburton of Dirleton (died circa 1449), Lord High Treasurer of Scotland was a Scottish noble.

Life

The eldest son of Sir John Haliburton of Dirleton (d. 1392), b …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Life
memoryArtifacts.description: The eldest son of Sir John Haliburton of Dirleton (d. 1392), by his spouse Margaret, daughter of Sir John Cameron of Ballegarno. He succeeded to the Dirleton estate in East Lothian, upon the death of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Halyburton於1360年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓時，他的父親Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton46歲，母親Margaret Cameron41歲。他於1402年8月與Lady Isabelle Stewart結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年5月10日在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Halyburton于1360年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓时，他的父亲Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton46岁，母亲Margaret Cameron41岁。他于1402年8月与Lady Isabelle Stewart结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年5月10日在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安迪萊頓享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Halyburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Halliburton
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Haliburton in Berwickshire.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Halyburton was born in 1360, in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, was 46 and his mother, Margaret Cameron, was 41. He married Lady Isabelle Stewart in August 1402. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 10 May 1449, in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Halyburton est né en 1360, à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cameron, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabelle Stewart en août 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1449, à Dirleton, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Halyburton 1360 in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton 46 und seine Mutter Margaret Cameron 41. Er hat im August 1402 Lady Isabelle Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1449 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Dirleton, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Halyburton è nato il nel 1360 nel Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cameron, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Lady Isabelle Stewart nel agosto 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 maggio 1449, nel Dirleton, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Halyburtonが1360年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンで生まれた時，父Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirletonは46歳，母Margaret Cameronは41歳であった。1402年8月にLady Isabelle Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年5月10日にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンディルレトンで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Halyburton(이)가 1360년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cameron(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1402년 8월 Lady Isabelle Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 5월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 디를레턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Isabelle Stewart em agosto de 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1449, em Dirleton, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Halyburton родился в 1360 г. в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William John Hailburton - Earl Of Dirleton было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cameron, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabelle Stewart август 1402 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 мая 1449 г. в местности дирлетон, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.
